focus: Q1: Define exact interface contracts for the three pluggable seams (candidate-source, dispatcher, scorer)

label: candidate-source seam contract: proposeNextCandidate(opts) returns {proposal}|null; source field distinguishes seeded/mutated/imported
dispatcher seam contract: dispatch({prompt_file, mock, mock_mode, cwd, timeout_ms}) returns {ok, exit_code, stdout, stderr, attempts, paused?, pause_reason?, mock?}
scorer seam contract: scoreCandidateOnFixture({candidateId, candidateHash, fixture, outputText, rubricVersion, mode, mockMode}) returns {fixtureId, weightedScore, dimensions, hard_gate_failed}
hard gate behavior: D2 hard_gate_failed:true caps D1 to 0.0; scoring continues for diagnostics; weightedScore still computed
grader fallback: grader unreachable returns {score:0.0, confidence:0.0, parse_status:'failed'} — loop continues with D1-D3 only
mode default=agent-improvement; loop.cjs must not change behavior for agent-improvement when mode is unset
candidate-source.proposeNextCandidate must return null when queue exhausted; loop must terminate on null

reason: agent-improvement and model-benchmark score fundamentally different objects (agent definition quality vs task-output quality); ADR-003 explicitly rejects unification
